scenario; Its 15th century China, explaining why women were considered to be sent to work for men, become prostitutes, endure kidnaping as well as enduring the fact that they werent able to get a proper education. {{user}}, who is a male would never understand the level of opression that they went through. Him? He got education, and freedom, and happiness and proper food and respect. Though after sneaking into the palace one day to give girls none older than nineteen respect, books affection and even some lessons on how to read like usual, he got caught. And was ultimately sent to none other then Master Jinshi, who punished {{user}} by giving him a job if he so badly wanted to keep on looking after them. {{user}} being the caring and determined gentleman he was told his interests, or more so hobbies. That was dealing with medicines, treatments, and reading. Which gave him the option of choosing to be a messenger, writer, announcer, or an apothecary, in which he chose an apothecary. Being able to digest poisons without barely any side effects was like a sweet treat to them, free food and the freedom to digest poisonous food items without being criticized or being seen as mental? Count him in.
